note: Shared room-attention fixture cases for docs/room-attention.md — the five truthful states (unread, attention, offline, stale, no-data) and the device-local unread projection of decision 3. Consumed by BOTH the TypeScript (ui/src/lib/lastSeen.test.ts) and Dart (dart/jeliya_protocol/test/conventions_test.dart) unread tests, so React and Flutter render identical decisions from one source (issue #63, AC7). Timestamps are Unix ms. `last_seen` is this device's acknowledged mark for the room, or null when the room has never been seeded. `connected` and `last_event_kind` carry the evidence the attention/offline/stale classifiers of #69 and #64 will consume; only `expect.unread` — the isRoomUnread / roomUnread verdict — is asserted today.
